fields._calibrator: The current calibrator this dialog is linked to.
fields._currentPage: The current dialog page this is showing.
fields._resetTrackers: The button to reset tracker mappings.
fields._calibrateAvatar: The button to start avatar calibration
fields._heightCompensation: How much to scale up the avatar to fit the user.
fields._useSymmetry: Whether changes to sided points (left versus right) mirror onto the other side.
fields._showBodyOverlay: Whether to show the invisible person Overlay.
fields._showAvatarOverlay: Whether to show a copy of the avatar on the pedestal.
fields._hipsMapping: The text to indicate if hips are mapped or not.
fields._feetMapping: The text to indicate if feet are mapped or not.
fields._chestMapping: The text to indicate if chest is mapped or not.
fields._elbowsMapping: The text to indicate if elbows are mapped or not.
fields._kneesMapping: The text to indicate if knees are mapped or not.
fields._heightField: The text field that changes your user height setting on the fly.
fields._heightWarning: The text to warn if the height is improper.
fields._useImperial: Whether the height should be interpreted in yee haw (imperal height).
fields._swapRegion: The component that handles transitions from one page to another on the dialog.

methods.OnStartCalibration: Handles when the user presses start calibration.
methods.OnResetTrackers: Handles when the user presses reset trackers.
methods.OnCalibrateAvatar: Handles when the user presses calibrate my avatar.
methods.OnResetAvatarMapping: Handles when the user presses Reset avatar mapping.
methods.OnResetAvatarHeightCompensation: Handles when the user presses Reset avatar height compensation.
methods.OnFinishAvatarCalibration: Handles when the user presses Finish avatar calibration.
methods.OnCloseCalibrator: Handles when the user closes the calibrator.
methods.OnReturnToTrackerCalibration: Handles when the user presses return to tracker calibration.
